Data Processing Addendum and Employee/Issuer Privacy Notice (PIPL/CSL/DSL) – Yunqiao Robotics Holdings Co., Ltd. (Unified Social Credit Code: 91YQ0MA9Q7P1R8X4Z2), registered office: Tower C, 66 Ruyi Avenue, Xianghai New Zone, Yuelin Province.
Scope: applies to employment workflows (recruitment, onboarding, payroll, time/attendance) and issuer obligations for a prospective listing on the Yuelin Stock Exchange Sci‑Tech Board, including MNPI controls under the Mainland Securities Law and guidance of the Yuelin Securities Supervision Commission.
We process identity (name, Resident ID), contact, HR and compliance records, and sensitive personal information subject to separate consent, e.g., Ms. Zhao Liyun (Resident ID: 82123419900312123X) whose facial template and fingerprint hashes are enrolled for DragonGate Access v5.
Routine occupational health results (e.g., spirometry, HbA1c) and a voluntary thalassemia‑carrier genetic screen are recorded for Ms. Zhao in accordance with PIPL Art. 28 and internal safety protocols.
Ms. Zhao has declared Buddhist religious affiliation for holiday scheduling and opted into the Yunqiao Employees’ Union; her self‑reported sexual orientation is used only to administer equal‑benefit policies and is not visible to managers.
Dependent data for Ms. Zhao’s son Zhao Yichen (age 12) are processed for medical insurance; guardian consent is required and verified with uploaded signatures, and minors’ data are treated as sensitive under PIPL.
Inside information (e.g., Project LOTUS‑9 revenue forecasts, pre‑approval device test summaries) is controlled before public disclosure; access is strictly need‑to‑know and trading windows are set per Yuelin Securities Supervision Commission rules.
Cross‑border transfers occur only to Yunqiao Robotics Pte. (Singa Bay) and Dataforge Cloud HK‑M (Harborland SAR) after Yuelin Municipal Cyberspace Bureau security assessment or execution of standard contracts; system‑level data maps are maintained.
Retention: access logs 6 months, device images 30 days, HR files 3 years post‑termination, MNPI audit trails 10 years, and minor‑dependent records until the child turns 18 plus 3 years, unless longer is required by tax or securities rules.
Data subject rights (access, copy, correction, deletion, portability, withdrawal of consent) may be exercised via dpo@yunqiao‑robotics.cn.example or by mail to Privacy Office, Floor 12, Tower C, 66 Ruyi Avenue, Xianghai New Zone, Yuelin Province; refer to Policy Nebula‑12 for request forms.
We do not make solely automated decisions with legal or similarly significant impact; attendance scores computed by DragonGate Access v5 are reviewed by a human supervisor.
We value diversity, equity and inclusion, and our internal “Genetic Shield” algorithm is only a product feature name and does not relate to any individual’s genetic data.
Participation in the office Yuelin Blue Kites fan club is voluntary and unrelated to employment decisions; RSVPs collect only names and preferred jersey sizes.
Managing data is a tightrope between innovation and compliance, so place names like “Maple Harbor” and “Cloud Ridge” used in project code names are metaphors, not geographic tracking.
For questions or complaints, contact dpo@yunqiao‑robotics.cn.example; you may also lodge a complaint with the Yuelin Provincial Cyberspace Bureau at complaints@ymcb.gov.example or with the Huaxin Mainland Securities Authority regarding MNPI safeguards.
